audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 437-440 read the live ERC20 balance via `IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))` and revert with `BidAmountTooHigh` if `amount > availableBalance`, directly enforcing the property. The check is placed before any transfers, and the reentrancy guard (`s_entered = true` at L418) eliminates any TOCTOU window between the balance read and the transfer at L444. All callers (including `AuctionBidder.bid()`) route through this same guard without bypass.
